title: Chapter 50
content:
Chapter 50

Now I'm not really a feet guy. I never liked to do anything with feet. But, there were times when even I had to bow down to women. Some very, very powerful women. And sometimes, actually, most of the time, they would make me kiss or touch their feet as a sense of dominance over me.

To put me in my place, one could say.

And it worked as well. In the beginning, when I was a total noob when it came to women, it was very difficult for me but I had to do what I had to do. Humiliating as it was, it saved my life in many instances.

So, I decided to turn it to my advantage. I learned whatever there was to learn about a woman's feet. And, the science was pretty simple. There were many areas that were connected to the essential parts of a woman.

Such as the ball of the feet was connected to the chest, breasts of a woman. It could stimulate them if the right pressure was applied. Inner foot and outer edge, otherwise known as the heel, were connected to the uterus, and in doing so, the entire fetal structure, crotch included.

Now, a simple question was involved. What would happen if I were to mix an element that could stimulate these points beyond the point of just a massage? What if these could be stimulated so much that a woman would...

"Aahmmm~~~"

As I let mana into her foot and let it reach the deepest parts of her body through her feet, Zara moaned without knowing what had just happened. Just like all the women in this world, she was new to this kind of pleasure as well.

"Wa-Wai--aaaatttt~~~"

She was about to stop me, but a hard press into her heel and her crotch, and everything included, was stimulated by mana. She could feel pleasure, but she could also feel something much more beyond that point. I pressed again and again, and she moaned, again and again.

Until finally, a time came and she raised her waist, letting out a long, sensual moan.

"Hyyaaaannnn~~~"

She came. I could feel her ragged breath and her rising chest as it rose and fell with each deep breath. I smiled and stepped back. With that, she wouldn't be asking for anything else for the day. Such a relief couldn't be compared with anything after all.

"Haa... Haa..." I stood back to still take her deep breaths. Her maids had no idea what had happened, but they had never seen. I remained in my spot until the lady managed to get a hold of herself.

The first thing she said as she looked at me was...

"Do it again."

Dayum.

~~

"Haann~~"

"UUnnhh~~~"

"No morrreeeaaahhnn~~~"

After making her cum three more times, when she was nothing but a limp piece of flesh. We had to relocate to the bed because she was not too uncomfortable writhing in pleasure in the chair. Of course, we missed breakfast too because she sent the servant who was called for her away.

Her own maids were too distraught with what was happening, but none of them did anything because their mistress hadn't uttered a simple 'No' yet.

However, even I had to stop when she uttered the 'No more' in her moan. Like I may have mentioned before, in these times, if you even looked at a noble wrongly, despite the absence of any sexual desires, there would be a blade waiting for you. The kind that falls on your head and separates it from your body into a basket.

Anyway, with all of that in mind, it was wise not to touch her without her permission. Only when she would ask me to do something was I permitted to touch her.

Since there was no knowledge of sexual acts, it wouldn't matter which part of her I would touch, crotch or face, it would be considered the same and a crime. A peasant touching a noble and all.

Finally, she managed to recover after about ten minutes. Once she calmed down, she looked underneath and saw her wet dress. Instead of getting embarrassed like any other woman thinking they had peed, she touched the spot with her finger and once it was damp, she sniffed her finger to see if it really was pee.

It turned out that it wasn't. She looked at me and asked, "What was it that you just did?"

"It's a method of massage I developed, Lady Zara. It's a method to make a woman feel good. I'm sure you must have felt something coming out of your vagina. It is something that comes out when a woman feels good." I went the extra mile with my explanation, and she rationally nodded.

It seemed like she wasn't as stuck up as nobles were. I could assume her background was from either a merchant house or a house with a similar noble title. Compared to nobles, she was too rational to be called unreasonable.

"Mhm." She nodded before she looked at me, "From today onwards, you are to do this every morning when you come in and every night before you leave. Understood?"

"Understood, Lady Zara," I replied.

However, before she could reply, I continued, "But, may I be rude enough to voice a suggestion?"

"...I'll allow it." She replied after a brief moment of silence.

"It would be better if I were to massage you directly at the source instead of your feet," I suggested the idea to access her pussy.

"Hmmm..." She mused for a while. Even if the concept of sex didn't exist, letting another man see her without her clothes, especially a commoner like me, had severe implications for her status. She understood the risks, but it wasn't a big deal either. If it were just my status, then there were plenty of ways to solve those issues.

"I'll think about it." And remaining as cool-headed as possible, she seemed to have come to the same conclusion as I. The present company. If she couldn't agree due to my status, then she simply needed to make it so there were no witnesses.

"You may leave now." She said while she waved her hand, signaling me to leave.

That was a bit awkward, so I asked the question, "May I ask something, Lady Zara?"

"What?" Zara asked.

"I am appointed to be your guard. What am I to do if not be in your presence?" I asked.

"You're an awakener, correct?" She asked.

"Yes, Lady Zara," I replied.

"Then I grant you the permission to train yourself in my personal training room. You may spend your time there until I call for you." Zara dismissed me with these words. I nodded and turned to leave under the guidance of a maid who would take me to the said training room.

~~

I spent the noon and afternoon inside the training room. Since there was not much for me to do, I did basic body exercises. They wouldn't benefit me in terms of stats, but it was to get familiar with this body more. By around four pm, just an hour before my shift ended, a man came to fetch me.

He took me straight to a room that wasn't the lord's room or his study, or his office.

"Please wait inside." He said and left. As I entered, I saw no one in the room, but soon, another door inside the room opened and Zara entered the room dressed in a blue colored frock dress. It was different from what she was wearing in the morning.

Once she was inside, she said, "I have considered your proposal to make me feel good via my vagina. However, I have a question."

"What may it be, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"What do you desire in return?" She asked.

She sure was shrewd. She knew I desired something in return, and it wasn't money. That was already offered to me. And I didn't have to do something like this either, since it wasn't a part of my contract. To her, it made sense. I could be trying to curry a favor with a noble.

But contrary to her expectations, I didn't exactly need anything. There was something, but I had an inkling she wouldn't be too fond of it.

Still, it never hurt to ask.

"Can you keep a secret for me, Lady Zara?" I asked.

"A secret?" She asked.

"Yes," I replied.

She thought for a while before she asked, "And what would be the guarantee?"

"A mana contract." I simply replied. I really hoped there was a mana contract here because I hadn't searched that far yet.

"A mana contract?" She mused for a while before she said, "As long as your secret doesn't hold any evil intentions, I shall not break it."

Not good enough.

"Then what about transformations?" I asked. Even if she could glean something from it and mention it, it wouldn't help her since there was no proof on my body.

"Hmm..." She thought for a while before she said, "As long as you're not a half being of a demon, I swear upon my mana and blood that I shall not tell anyone your secret."

Close enough.

I could sense her mana rattling. If she were to break her oath, that would mean she would lose her everything if she were to break her oath.

With a smile, I nodded and said, "Why don't you decide for yourself if it is demonic or not?"

With that, I took off my pants and activated the state of completion.

~~
